parents.subject: LU-0000 llite: COPY safely duplicate iov_iter

commit.subject: LU-0000 clio: parallelize unaligned DIO writes
commit.message:
LU-0000 clio: parallelize unaligned DIO writes

This parallelizes the data copy for unaligned DIO writes.

Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I4fb80f85ce4121da4de845773920ff9a2357c99f
